sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76820" key="paleuta/" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παλ-ευτά·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ λίνα οἷς τὰ θηρία ἁλίσκεται</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
